recent_observations.market_summary: Unable to read today's journal, positions, or prior observation files due local execution sandbox failure, so this reflection is data-incomplete. No reliable session-level market conclusion can be drawn from repository state.

patterns_detected.name: missing_session_data
patterns_detected.notes: Repository files could not be accessed in this runtime (sandbox command execution blocked), preventing trade-level analysis.

confidence_calibration.assessment: No calibratable sample was available because today's reports and active positions could not be read.

recent_observations.forward_outlook: Re-run this reflection after restoring local file access; prioritize reviewing journal execution quality, active risk, and sector context before next session.
lessons: Reflection quality depends on reliable access to structured journal and position data.
A blocked execution environment is itself an operational risk for end-of-day decision support.

self_improvement_proposals.title: Add reflection preflight checks
self_improvement_proposals.description: Run a preflight step that validates filesystem and command execution access before analysis; fail fast with actionable diagnostics.
self_improvement_proposals.expected_impact: Prevents silent analysis gaps and ensures daily review runs are dependable.

self_improvement_proposals.title: Persist compact daily snapshot artifact
self_improvement_proposals.description: Write a single end-of-day snapshot JSON (trades, active positions, PnL, sector context, key events) that can be parsed without multiple file reads.
self_improvement_proposals.expected_impact: Improves robustness of reflection workflows and reduces dependency on directory traversal.

self_improvement_proposals.title: Add no-data risk protocol
self_improvement_proposals.description: When review data is unavailable, automatically reduce new risk-taking (smaller size or no new entries) until observability is restored.
self_improvement_proposals.expected_impact: Limits exposure during periods of degraded monitoring and decision support.
